creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi, 

This is a known problem.  A fix has not yet been committed, but is available 
at http://people.freebsd.org/~attilio/hdac.diff - I believe this or a patch 
similar to this is planned to be committed before BETA3.  Please could you test
that patch and let us know if it fixes the problem you are seeing?
